value.name: Foundation
value.description: Build your dynasty around them. Elite, must-start every week, league-winning asset.

value.name: Cornerstone
value.description: Rock-solid weekly starter. Top-of-position floor with proven ceiling.

value.name: Starter
value.description: Locked-in lineup piece. Reliable production with weekly upside.

value.name: Flex
value.description: Borderline starter or strong flex play. Has weeks where they win you the matchup.

value.name: Depth
value.description: Reliable bench piece / bye-week filler. Spot starter when matchups line up.

value.name: Stash
value.description: Speculative hold. Bench upside if a path to volume opens up.

value.name: Watchlist
value.description: Waiver wire / monitor only. Not a roster lock in standard formats.

positional.description: 12-team league bucketing: top-12 at position = Pos1, 13-24 = Pos2, etc.

players.name: Darren Waller
players.override_note: Aging + injury history; not a dynasty asset

players.name: Dalton Schultz
players.override_note: Aging + low ceiling + 3rd option in target tree

players.name: Mark Andrews
players.override_note: Still BAL TE1; 2025 down year doesn't end his dynasty value

players.name: Josh Allen
players.override_note: Clear QB1 dynasty asset; multi-year elite + ceiling

players.name: Justin Jefferson
players.override_note: Elite when healthy and with QB play; floor too low at WR16

players.name: Joe Burrow
players.override_note: Top-5 QB when healthy; ceiling far above current rank

players.name: Nico Collins
players.override_note: Proven elite WR1 on a passing offense; floor is high

players.name: Jaylen Waddle
players.override_note: Buried behind Hill; route tree limited

players.name: Kyle Pitts
players.override_note: Years of underperforming draft slot; 2025 was a flash not a baseline

players.name: Jake Tonges
players.override_note: One-year flash; depth chart fragile

players.name: Jameson Williams
players.override_note: Option 4 in DET behind ARSB / LaPorta / Gibbs; boom-bust

players.name: Greg Dulcich
players.override_note: Limited snap share; YPRR flash on tiny sample

players.name: Alec Pierce
players.override_note: One-year wonder; profile says revert

players.name: Trey McBride
players.override_note: Best in-season TE production; deserves the TE2 spot firmly

players.name: Wan'Dale Robinson
players.override_note: Nabers is the alpha; W-Rob is a slot specialist

players.name: Christian Watson
players.override_note: Boom-bust deep WR; not a stable dynasty asset

players.name: Quentin Johnston
players.override_note: Snap share regression risk; McConkey is the better route runner in LAC

players.name: Parker Washington
players.override_note: Not the WR1 on JAX

players.name: Brenton Strange
players.override_note: Sample inflation; Evan Engram return dilutes role

players.name: De'Von Achane
players.override_note: Elite production but durability + size concerns for dynasty

players.name: Zay Flowers
players.override_note: High variance / run-heavy offense limits weekly ceiling

players.name: Michael Mayer
players.override_note: Buried behind Bowers in LV; no path to volume

players.name: Rashee Rice
players.override_note: KC alpha when on the field; suspension behind him

players.name: C.J. Stroud
players.override_note: Underperformed sophomore year; ceiling intact but floor low

players.name: Malik Nabers
players.override_note: True alpha for NYG; bell-cow target share

players.name: Brock Bowers
players.override_note: Clear long-term TE1; target monster + young + athletic

players.name: Bo Nix
players.override_note: Single-year breakout; below proven elite tier

players.name: Troy Franklin
players.override_note: 3rd option in DEN passing tree

players.name: Jayden Daniels
players.override_note: Franchise QB with proven rookie ceiling; bounce-back expected

players.name: Ladd McConkey
players.override_note: True LAC alpha; consistently wins on routes

players.name: Ricky Pearsall
players.override_note: Injury history + crowded SF backfield (CMC / Kittle / Deebo)

players.name: Rome Odunze
players.override_note: Crowded Chicago target tree

players.name: Ashton Jeanty
players.override_note: Consensus rookie alpha; high pick + featured workload + young

players.name: Colston Loveland
players.override_note: Bears TE1 of the future with Caleb; clear runway

players.name: Tyler Warren
players.override_note: IND TE1; physical traits + uptrending offense

players.name: Emeka Egbuka
players.override_note: TB WR1 with Mayfield; Evans/Godwin aging out; elite rookie production

players.name: Cam Ward
players.override_note: Top draft capital but production was modest rookie year

players.name: Travis Hunter
players.override_note: Two-way usage caps fantasy upside

players.name: Fernando Mendoza
